global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent call-to-action and game elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join the game with a bonus offer.

elements.label: Join the arena
elements.description: A bold, white text that reads 'Join the arena' prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: No ads in first week
elements.description: A smaller, white text that states 'No ads in first week' positioned below the headline.

elements.label: VoxelRealm BONUS
elements.description: A bright, eye-catching logo that says 'VoxelRealm BONUS' in a playful font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Start now
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Start now' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Game grid
elements.description: A grid-like structure with four circles, suggesting a gameplay or app interface.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A simple right-facing arrow icon indicating progression or navigation.

elements.label: Circle icon
elements.description: A small circle icon that appears to be part of the game grid.

elements.label: Circle icon
elements.description: Another small circle icon, similar to the previous one, within the game grid.

elements.label: Circle icon
elements.description: A small circle icon positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Circle icon
elements.description: Another small circle icon located at the top right of the ad.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background that fills the entire ad space, providing a vibrant backdrop.
elements.text_content: Join the arena No ads in first week

elements.label: Bonus label
elements.description: A small, bright label indicating a bonus, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: Start now button
elements.description: A clear, inviting button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Start now' in white.
